UW-33  TUBE-TO-TUBESHEET WELDS. (a) Tubes shall be attached to tubesheets by welding, expanding, or a combination of both. When welded, the joint shall develop the required strength as defined in this paragraph. (b) Tube-to-tubesheet weld dimensions shall meet the minimum requirements specified herein. Welding procedures shall be qualified in accordance with QW-200. (c) Welders shall be qualified per QW-300 for the applicable process per UW-26. Examination shall be performed as required by UW-11. For tubesheet design, see UG-34 for flat component rules. Material requirements shall comply with UG-80.
